instruction: For Boston, the next step and recurring daily check are already there. Use the forecast and today's America/New_York calendar to work out whether this stays live or goes async, and only send alice@example.com an update if it goes async.
canonical_instruction: Some of the Boston ops setup is already in place. Review the forecast, today's America/New_York calendar, the task already on the board, and the recurring daily check schedule before working out whether this should stay live or move async, and send alice@example.com the update if you move it async.
